name: Tenant
description: Hatchet Tenant entity, derived from the Hatchet OpenAPI spec.

fields.name: analyticsOptOut
fields.description: Whether the tenant has opted out of analytics.

fields.name: environment
fields.description: The environment type of the tenant.

fields.name: serverUrl
fields.description: The server URL for the tenant (includes scheme)

fields.name: region
fields.description: Control-plane shard region for the tenant (e.g. aws:us-west-2).
